design_philosophy.core_loop: Investigate conspiracy while choosing between stealth, combat, and social approaches to solve multi-solution level designs
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Player agency vs. predetermined narrative outcomes; exploration and problem-solving through multiple viable approaches
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Cybernetically enhanced secret agent uncovering global conspiracies with freedom to approach objectives as desired
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Series is defined by offering multiple solutions to gameplay problems rather than linear prescribed paths. Combines FPS, stealth, and RPG systems into levels designed for player experimentation. Emphasizes immersive simulation where player choice meaningfully impacts progression and narrative outcomes.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player can choose approach (stealth vs. direct combat) which affects difficulty; augmentation system allows customization of playstyle

progression.upgrade_system: Augmentation system: mechanical and nanotechnological artificial organs that protagonists equip to impact gameplay styles and capabilities
progression.unlock_mechanism: Progression through investigation of conspiracy narrative unlocks new areas and augmentation options
replayability_hooks: Multiple solution paths to each objective encourage replaying with different approaches
Augmentation customization creates varied playstyle options
Narrative branching tied to player choices

world_building_techniques: Conspiracy investigation structure tied to gameplay progression
Cyberpunk science fiction setting rooted in transhumanist themes
Character-driven narrative following protagonist uncovering mysteries

danger_signals: Conspiracy reaching into player's own employers
Discrimination and control themes in series
environmental_storytelling: Cyberpunk future setting with augmentation as visible social marker
Pandemic affecting world state and NPC interactions
